channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Mamdani Realises He Can't Legally Arrest Netanyahu, Urges US To Enforce Warrant

media:content.media:description: Mamdani believes ICC warrant is justified and said Netanyahu "is not welcome in New York City."

item.description: The New York City mayor said that the city lacks the authority to enforce the International Criminal Court's arrest warrant against the Israeli prime minister.
item.content:encoded: The New York City mayor said that the city lacks the authority to enforce the International Criminal Court's arrest warrant against the Israeli prime minister.

item.title: 'He Didn't Stop While Convicted': Epstein Survivor Recalls Years Of Abuse

media:content.media:description: The model revealed that she was molested and raped every weekend in West Palm Beach

item.description: At the centre of Roza Gilles story is Jeffrey Epstein's 2008 plea deal in Florida for charges including soliciting a minor for prostitution.
item.content:encoded: At the centre of Roza Gilles story is Jeffrey Epstein's 2008 plea deal in Florida for charges including soliciting a minor for prostitution.

item.title: Trump Threatens To Bomb Iran's Pickaxe Nuke Site Soon. But Can US Destroy It?

media:content.media:description: Pickaxe Mountain is located 220 km (140 miles) south of Tehran

item.description: The warning came even as it remains unclear just what has been placed at Pickaxe Mountain, as the United Nations' nuclear watchdog has never gained access to the site.
item.content:encoded: The warning came even as it remains unclear just what has been placed at Pickaxe Mountain, as the United Nations' nuclear watchdog has never gained access to the site.

item.title: Renowned Indian-Origin Scientist Quits US Lab After Sexual Misconduct Probe

media:content.media:description: Pand denied the sexual misconduct allegations

item.description: It was at least the second time in recent years that Salk has investigated Satchidananda Panda following harassment allegations.
item.content:encoded: It was at least the second time in recent years that Salk has investigated Satchidananda Panda following harassment allegations.

item.title: More Women Accuse Tate Brothers Of Rape. Charges Against Them Rise To 59

media:content.media:description: Social media influencer Andrew Tate (left) and his brother Tristan Tate

item.description: Newly unsealed court documents reveal that more victims have come forward, alleging sexual and physical abuse by the Tata brothers,
item.content:encoded: Newly unsealed court documents reveal that more victims have come forward, alleging sexual and physical abuse by the Tata brothers,

item.title: Indian-Origin Doctor Jailed In US For Recording Hospital Staff In Restroom

media:content.media:description: Deshmukh was a third-year University of Toledo medical resident.

item.description: The case against the Indian-origin man began in June 2025, when an employee discovered a cellphone hidden inside a unisex restroom at the ProMedica Toledo Hospital in Ohio.
item.content:encoded: The case against the Indian-origin man began in June 2025, when an employee discovered a cellphone hidden inside a unisex restroom at the ProMedica Toledo Hospital in Ohio.

item.title: Trump Approves Saudi Nuclear Deal That Could Allow Uranium Enrichment: Report

media:content.media:description: Trump approved an agreement with Saudi Arabia that potentially provides it with uranium enrichment

item.description: The 30-year deal, expected to be announced Wednesday, would involve US firms and could pave the way for a Saudi enrichment facility.
item.content:encoded: The 30-year deal, expected to be announced Wednesday, would involve US firms and could pave the way for a Saudi enrichment facility.

item.title: Trump Resumes Direct US-Lebanon Flights After More Than 40 Years

media:content.media:description: Trump pledged to help Lebanon during a White House meeting with Joseph Aoun

item.description: The surprise move ends a suspension dating back to 1985, when the Reagan administration halted direct flights after a TWA hijacking.
item.content:encoded: The surprise move ends a suspension dating back to 1985, when the Reagan administration halted direct flights after a TWA hijacking.

item.title: S Jaishankar Calls For Deeper India-ASEAN Cooperation Amid Global Turbulence

media:content.media:description: S Jaishankar will join foreign ministers of Australia, Japan and the United States at the Quad meeting.

item.description: India-ASEAN partnership focuses on trade, investment, mobility, technology, sustainability, and connectivity.
item.content:encoded: India-ASEAN partnership focuses on trade, investment, mobility, technology, sustainability, and connectivity.

item.title: 2 India-Bound Ships Make U-turns As Houthis Threaten Another Saudi Oil Route

media:content.media:description: Iran-backed Houthis have declared a naval blockade against Saudi Arabia

item.description: The changes in direction by the vessels suggest a second potential disruption to a major shipping route from the Middle East that could compound the shortfall in global energy markets, already under crisis due to the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: The changes in direction by the vessels suggest a second potential disruption to a major shipping route from the Middle East that could compound the shortfall in global energy markets, already under crisis due to the closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 3 Of Hyderabad Family Die In Road Accident In US

media:content.media:description: A road accident in California killed three family members from Hyderabad.

item.description: Three members of a family from Hyderabad died and two others were injured in a road accident in the US state of California, according to information received by their family here on Tuesday.
item.content:encoded: Three members of a family from Hyderabad died and two others were injured in a road accident in the US state of California, according to information received by their family here on Tuesday.

item.title: France Becomes First EU Nation To Ban Social Media For Children Under 15

media:content.media:description: The ban won't cover online encyclopedias, or educational or scientific directories

item.description: Both chambers of France's Parliament passed the law, which also bars phone use in high schools and aims to take effect by September.
item.content:encoded: Both chambers of France's Parliament passed the law, which also bars phone use in high schools and aims to take effect by September.

item.title: "Won't Forget": China Thanks India For Rescuing Crew From Fire-Stricken Tanker

media:content.media:description: India and China flags fly as Beijing thanks Delhi for Kerala crew rescue effort

item.description: Chinese Defence Attache You Jian thanked India's military for rescuing 12 crew members from a burning cargo ship off Kerala last year
item.content:encoded: Chinese Defence Attache You Jian thanked India's military for rescuing 12 crew members from a burning cargo ship off Kerala last year

item.title: Iran-US War News Live Updates: US Says It Bombed Iranian Op Centres, Aircraft Hangars, On 11th Night Of Strike

media:content.media:description: Shipping through the Strait of Hormuz has largely stalled

item.description: US-Iran War News Live Updates: The US State Department has issued an alert urging American citizens around the world to "exercise increased caution" over the war with Iran. The alert said that "due to heightened tensions in the Middle East.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War News Live Updates: The US State Department has issued an alert urging American citizens around the world to "exercise increased caution" over the war with Iran. The alert said that "due to heightened tensions in the Middle East.

item.title: Trump Announces Upto 200% Tariffs On Generic Drugs, Move May Impact India

media:content.media:description: Trump said the objective of this policy is to protect the people of the United States.

item.description: India is often called the "pharmacy of the world" as it supplies generic medicines to countries across the globe. In the US, Indian generic medicines make up nearly 40 per cent by volume.
item.content:encoded: India is often called the "pharmacy of the world" as it supplies generic medicines to countries across the globe. In the US, Indian generic medicines make up nearly 40 per cent by volume.

item.title: US Military Launches 11th Consecutive Night Of Strikes On Iran

media:content.media:description: The US military said it launched an 11th night of strikes on Iran Wednesday.

item.description: US military says it's launched an 11th night of strikes on Iran as they vie for control of choked-off Strait of Hormuz.
item.content:encoded: US military says it's launched an 11th night of strikes on Iran as they vie for control of choked-off Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: US Identifies 3rd American Soldier Believed To Be Killed In Iran Attack

media:content.media:description: The confirmation brings the death count to 18 US service members killed since the war began.

item.description: The US military has confirmed that a third service member is believed to be dead in Friday's attack on a base in Jordan and identified them as Sgt. Angel S. Rampersad, 28, of Ozone Park, New York.
item.content:encoded: The US military has confirmed that a third service member is believed to be dead in Friday's attack on a base in Jordan and identified them as Sgt. Angel S. Rampersad, 28, of Ozone Park, New York.

item.title: Trump Says Imported Generic Drugs To Face 100% Tariff From August 2028
item.description: US President Donald Trump announced on Tuesday the imposition of steep tariffs on imported generic drugs from August 2028, a move he said was aimed at onshoring production of such pharmaceutical products.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump announced on Tuesday the imposition of steep tariffs on imported generic drugs from August 2028, a move he said was aimed at onshoring production of such pharmaceutical products.

item.title: 40 People Kidnapped By Nigerian Gang: Report

media:content.media:description: Across the country's various, often overlapping security crises, abductions have proved lucrative.

item.description: Kidnappings have become a key moneymaking strategy for armed groups in Nigeria, including jihadists in the northeast and non-ideological gangs locally known as bandits who dominate the northwest.
item.content:encoded: Kidnappings have become a key moneymaking strategy for armed groups in Nigeria, including jihadists in the northeast and non-ideological gangs locally known as bandits who dominate the northwest.

item.title: Trump Vows To Help Lebanon Pursue Peace With Israel

media:content.media:description: Joseph Aoun asked Trump for political support and continued backing for the Lebanese army.

item.description: US President Donald Trump vowed Tuesday to help Lebanon "a lot" as its president, Joseph Aoun, sought Washington's backing for a fragile effort to disarm Hezbollah and forge a path to peace with Israel.
item.content:encoded: US President Donald Trump vowed Tuesday to help Lebanon "a lot" as its president, Joseph Aoun, sought Washington's backing for a fragile effort to disarm Hezbollah and forge a path to peace with Israel.
